ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "time_slot" INTEGER /* Identifier for the time slot of the performance data */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Unix timestamp of the performance data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the performance data */,
  "block_index" INTEGER /* Index of the block for which performance is recorded */,
  "block_length" INTEGER /* Length of the block in terms of data segments */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Gamma value used in decision-making */,
  "max_gain" REAL /* Maximum possible gain for the block */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weighted values for decision-making */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of selecting each network */,
  "selection_type" INTEGER /* Type of selection made (e.g., random, strategic) */,
  "network_selected" INTEGER /* Network selected for the block */,
  "delay" REAL /* Delay experienced during data transfer */,
  "bytes_transferred" INTEGER /* Total bytes transferred during the block */,
  "bytes_without_delay" INTEGER /* Bytes transferred without considering delay */,
  "bit_rate" REAL /* Bit rate achieved during the block */,
  "selection_duration" REAL /* Duration of the selection process */,
  "connect_download_duration" REAL /* Duration for connection and download */,
  "bytes_downloaded_selection" TEXT /* Bytes downloaded during previous network selection */,
  "bytes_per_network" TEXT /* Bytes transferred per network */,
  "time_network_selected" TEXT /* Time the network was selected */,
  "gain_prev_block" REAL /* Gain from the previous block */,
  "log" TEXT /* Log of events and decisions */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the network at the time of measurement */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate of the network at the time of measurement */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the network at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_slot"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_network_selected FOREIGN KEY ("network_selected") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the network */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Area covered by the network */,
  "avg_bit_rate" REAL /* Average bit rate of the network */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used by the network */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth capacity of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system used by the user */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the application used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "impact_level" INTEGER /* Level of impact on network performance */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "data_usage" INTEGER /* Data usage during the activity */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity */,
  "data_transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of data transferred during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_provider_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network provider */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate of the network provider at the time of measurement */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter of the network provider at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_provider_performance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision log */,
  "time_slot" INTEGER /* Time slot associated with the decision */,
  "decision_rule" TEXT /* Rule used for making the decision */,
  "decision_time" TEXT /* Time when the decision was made */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the decision */,
  "decision_rule_used" TEXT /* Decision rule used to make the network selection */,
  "decision_input_data" TEXT /* Input data used to make the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decision_logs_time_slot FOREIGN KEY ("time_slot") REFERENCES network_performance ("time_slot")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_performance" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the device at the time of measurement */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the device at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_outages" (
  "outage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service outage */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network experiencing the outage */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the outage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the outage */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the outage */,
  "outage_duration" REAL /* Duration of the outage */,
  "outage_reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reason for the outage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_outages_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of system event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the system event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the system event on network performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_system" (
  "learning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning instance */,
  "time_slot" INTEGER /* Time slot associated with the learning instance */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for learning */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the learning system */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback for the learning system */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the learning model used */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_system_time_slot FOREIGN KEY ("time_slot") REFERENCES network_performance ("time_slot")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the network performance */,
  "feedback_comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user with their feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
